title: rubus × yatabei
intro: Rubus × yatabei, also known as Japanese raspberry or yubari king, is a hybrid species of the genus Rubus, characterized by its bright red and edible berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × yatabei include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially preventing certain types of cancer. Rubus × yatabei can be prepared as an herbal tea, dried extract, or fresh fruit, which is often consumed raw or used in jams and preserves.
